source_commit: 32abc0f task6-ddr3: correct v110 source7/source8 summary signatures
interpretation: Seed-13 variant still fails with no native progress: init done is observed, but pll_locked is false and init_error is true, with probe timing out waiting for read target. DFII uniform mismatch mask remains nonzero (84) while word mismatch is zero, and native read/write-side counters indicate zero wrdata events captured. This is consistent with prior late-phase instability (DFII path no longer showing clear data corruption but probe lifecycle failing before valid reads).
next_action: Run v99 with explicit DFII-only mode to isolate this state from native-side debug and confirm whether readscan target/timeout is introduced by native stage gating. Keep only one hypothesis active per cycle.
